title: stizolobium altissimum
intro: Stizolobium altissimum, also known as the tall peacock flower or tall snail flower, is a plant species in the pea family. It is a climbing vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, providing health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and immune system function. Herbal preparations of Stizolobium altissimum are typically made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by combining the plant with other herbs in a tincture or decoction.
